Surname.jp: 暗闇も見透かす怪しい情報屋

description.en: Attacks an enemy. Has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52401_0]</color> chance to grant <color=#28d9ed>Increased Speed</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52401_0] turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52401_0]</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52401_0]ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52401_0]</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52401_0]턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52401_0]</color>的几率使自身<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52401_0]回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy. After using this skill, reduces the cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>Grieving Orpheus</color> by <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52402_0] turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>【悲嘆のオルフェウス】</color>のスキルターンを<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52402_0]ターン</color>減少させる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>비탄의 오르페우스</color>의 스킬 쿨타임이 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52402_0]턴</color> 감소합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并使<color=#28d9ed>悲叹的俄耳甫斯</color>的技能冷却时间减少<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52402_0]回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's and target's Speed.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\nこのスキルは、自分と対象のスピードが高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n이 스킬은 자신과 대상의 속도가 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人。\n自身和目标的速度越高,则该技能的伤害越高。
